\"That was a bit too close.\": \"I do, Lord Gorm. It is yours if you want it.\"

\"That was a bit too close.\": (Just hold it up in silence.)

\"That was a bit too close.\": The looks at it. Then looks away.

\"That was a bit too close.\": \"And Wish is quite possibly a madder idea than my own. However...\"

\"That was a bit too close.\": \"I am sorry to say, even with that, I am far too gone in this. And even Wish cannot bring back a god.\"

« C'était un peu trop juste. »: « C'est seulement un sortilège du neuvième niveau. »

\"That was a bit too close.\": He refutes it. Yet you have pierced his SHELL.
« C'était un peu trop juste. »: Il le réfute. Pourtant tu as percé sa COQUILLE.

\"That was a bit too close.\": REMIND HIM OF HIS OATH.
« C'était un peu trop juste. »: RAPPELLE-LUI SON SERMENT.

\"That was a bit too close.\": This man knows more than you will ever know...
« C'était un peu trop juste. »: Cet homme en sait plus que tu n'en sauras jamais...

\"That was a bit too close.\": You are nothing compared to him.

\"That was a bit too close.\": He is alone.
« C'était un peu trop juste. »: Il est seul.

\"That was a bit too close.\": Tired. Weary from decades of fighting for his faded master.
« C'était un peu trop juste. »: Fatigué. Las de décennies de combat pour son maître effacé.

\"That was a bit too close.\": He has watched for twenty-seven years how everything they built has fallen apart.
« C'était un peu trop juste. »: Il a regardé pendant vingt-sept ans comment tout ce qu'ils ont construit s'est effondré.

\"That was a bit too close.\": The paladin wants to save his people. By casting himself as the villain. By destroying innocent lives, despite the pain it causes him.
« C'était un peu trop juste. »: Le paladin veut sauver son peuple. En s'auto-castant comme le méchant. En détruisant des vies innocentes, malgré la douleur que cela lui cause.

\"That was a bit too close.\": Is this what it means to be truly good? To go against everything natural and decent, to help untold future generations?
« C'était un peu trop juste. »: Est-ce cela que signifie être véritablement bon ? Aller contre tout ce qui est naturel et décent, pour aider d'innombrables générations futures ?

\"That was a bit too close.\": I cannot understand him.
« C'était un peu trop juste. »: Je ne peux pas le comprendre.

\"That was a bit too close.\": I understand him.
« C'était un peu trop juste. »: Je le comprends.

\"That was a bit too close.\": I... accept his view as valid?
« C'était un peu trop juste. »: Je... accepte sa vision comme valide ?

\"That was a bit too close.\": No, perhaps not.
« C'était un peu trop juste. »: Non, peut-être pas.

\"That was a bit too close.\": If empathy is off the table, then sympathy will take its place.
« C'était un peu trop juste. »: Si l'empathie est hors de portée, alors la sympathie prendra sa place.

\"That was a bit too close.\": It is not good. But it is what he thinks.

\"That was a bit too close.\": Something like that, yes.

\"That was a bit too close.\": That will help.

\"That was a bit too close.\": Despite all the horrors involved.

\"That was a bit too close.\": Not now. Perhaps if there was time.

\"That was a bit too close.\": But no.

\"That was a bit too close.\": I don't understand him.

\"That was a bit too close.\": You must try, despite this.

\"That was a bit too close.\": Please.

\"That was a bit too close.\": You glare at the rugged face of the world-worn paladin.

\"That was a bit too close.\": Nothing. No arguments. No plea.
« C'était un peu trop juste. »: Rien. Aucun argument. Aucune supplique.

\"That was a bit too close.\": You have no clue what to say to this broken shell of a man.
« C'était un peu trop juste. »: Tu n'as aucune idée de ce qu'il faut dire à cette coquille brisée d'homme.

\"That was a bit too close.\": The paladin stands before you.
« C'était un peu trop juste. »: Le paladin se tient devant toi.

\"That was a bit too close.\": You must ACT.
« C'était un peu trop juste. »: Tu dois AGIR.

\"That was a bit too close.\": \"I know, brother.\"
« C'était un peu trop juste. »: « Je le sais, frère. »

\"That was a bit too close.\": \"This is for their protection. Nothing else.\"
« C'était un peu trop juste. »: « C'est pour leur protection. Rien d'autre. »

\"That was a bit too close.\": No...
« C'était un peu trop juste. »: Non...

\"That was a bit too close.\": It is not the oath he stands by.

\"That was a bit too close.\": \"No, I do not know better than Urth. Because His judgment is GONE. And it must return.\"

\"That was a bit too close.\": He grabs his shaking, mutated fist.
« C'était un peu trop juste. »: Il saisit son poing tremblant et muté.

\"That was a bit too close.\": \"<shake>At any cost...!</shake>\"
« C'était un peu trop juste. »: « <shake>À tout prix... !</shake> »

\"That was a bit too close.\": His rage. He is holding it back.
« C'était un peu trop juste. »: Sa rage. Il la retient.

\"That was a bit too close.\": Do you see?

\"That was a bit too close.\": Push him and he will crack.

\"That was a bit too close.\": Unless you manage to get through to him, somehow.

« C'était un peu trop juste. »: « Je suis charmé. »

\"That was a bit too close.\": The broken man stands before you, open as a book.

\"That was a bit too close.\": \"...I have doubts.\"

\"That was a bit too close.\": \"Every moment. Every hour. But doubt does not stay my hand.\"

\"That was a bit too close.\": The paladin is not broken.

\"That was a bit too close.\": He knows exactly what his god is.

\"That was a bit too close.\": You have heard it before.

« C'était un peu trop juste. »: Il t'a dit exactement ce qu'Urth est — un dieu qui se sacrifie. Pourquoi ne devrait-il pas se rendre maléfique ? Pour ruiner toute sa vie et son but — pour abandonner sa propre vie et en voler vingt-six autres, à la poursuite du plus grand bien ?

\"That was a bit too close.\": You remember. You remember. You remember. You remember. You remember. You remember. You remember. You remember. You remember. You remember.
« C'était un peu trop juste. »: Tu te souviens. Tu te souviens. Tu te souviens. Tu te souviens. Tu te souviens. Tu te souviens. Tu te souviens. Tu te souviens. Tu te souviens. Tu te souviens.

\"That was a bit too close.\": There is the horrid truth. One deeply ingrained into the body and the skin and the muscle tissue of this broken man before you.
« C'était un peu trop juste. »: Voilà la vérité horrible. Une profondément ancrée dans le corps et la peau et le tissu musculaire de cet homme brisé devant toi.

\"That was a bit too close.\": This is a man who is throwing away everything, including the love of his god, for the purpose of reaching a better world.
« C'était un peu trop juste. »: C'est un homme qui jette tout, y compris l'amour de son dieu, dans le but d'atteindre un monde meilleur.

\"That was a bit too close.\": You can see it in his eyes.
« C'était un peu trop juste. »: Tu peux le voir dans ses yeux.

\"That was a bit too close.\": It is written in his flesh.
« C'était un peu trop juste. »: C'est écrit dans sa chair.

\"That was a bit too close.\": The grandest thing a good man can truly sacrifice, would be everything that makes him good.
« C'était un peu trop juste. »: La plus grande chose qu'un homme bon puisse vraiment sacrifier, serait tout ce qui fait sa bonté.

\"That was a bit too close.\": Gorm believes that. That somehow, he knows - in his vision-filled skull - this STRING will lead to a worthy end.

\"That was a bit too close.\": But he does not know anything.

\"That was a bit too close.\": He has faith - faith that Urth will set his wrongs right.

\"That was a bit too close.\": Exactly.

\"That was a bit too close.\": \"Lord Gorm.\" (Speak up.)

\"That was a bit too close.\": What this paladin does not understand however, is the most awful truth of all.

\"That was a bit too close.\": \"I hope I have made it clear. Our god never wanted us to pick up after him.\"
« C'était un peu trop juste. »: « J'espère l'avoir fait clairement comprendre. Notre dieu n'a jamais voulu qu'on ramasse après lui. »

\"That was a bit too close.\": \"But his sacrifices... with him gone, someone else has to keep giving.\"
« C'était un peu trop juste. »: « Mais ses sacrifices... avec lui parti, quelqu'un d'autre doit continuer à donner. »

\"That was a bit too close.\": \"I am not only willing, I am ready to-\"

\"That was a bit too close.\": \"You FOOL!\"

\"That was a bit too close.\": The paladin glares at you with wide eyes and open mouth.

\"That was a bit too close.\": Flabbergasted.

\"That was a bit too close.\": \"You DARE to place your burden upon HIS shoulders?!\"
« C'était un peu trop juste. »: « Tu OSES placer ton fardeau sur SES épaules ?! »

\"That was a bit too close.\": Anger flashes upon his rugged, and quite hairy, face.

\"That was a bit too close.\": \"You are no monster! You're a <shake>CHILD</shake>!\"

« Vous — »

\"That was a bit too close.\": \"A child running to his tired father, when the going gets tough. A father who gave him everything.\"
« C'était un peu trop juste. »: « Un enfant qui court vers son père fatigué, quand ça devient dur. Un père qui lui a tout donné. »

\"That was a bit too close.\": Gorm knows this. The intense rage now building in his chest is proof enough.
« C'était un peu trop juste. »: Gorm le sait. La rage intense qui monte maintenant dans sa poitrine en est preuve suffisante.

\"That was a bit too close.\": He grips his twitching arm.
« C'était un peu trop juste. »: Il agrippe son bras tressautant.

\"That was a bit too close.\": Anger comes only from a sense of injustice. When faced with unwanted truth, a man's <u>ego</u> will bring him to fury.
« C'était un peu trop juste. »: La colère ne vient que d'un sentiment d'injustice. Face à une vérité non désirée, l'<u>ego</u> d'un homme l'amènera à la fureur.

\"That was a bit too close.\": It is only in facing that <u>ego</u>, in breaking it, that your Lord Gorm will be redeemed.
« C'était un peu trop juste. »: C'est seulement en affrontant cet <u>ego</u>, en le brisant, que ton Seigneur Gorm sera racheté.

\"That was a bit too close.\": \"Yes, our city is falling. A corrupt cabal of Magistrates bringing everything to ruin. I see that. You have dealt with it alone for decades. Shackled to your duty.\"
« C'était un peu trop juste. »: « Oui, notre cité tombe. Une cabale corrompue de Magistrats menant tout à la ruine. Je le vois. Tu as fait face à cela seul pendant des décennies. Enchaîné à ton devoir. »

\"That was a bit too close.\": \"They threw away His legacy.\"
« C'était un peu trop juste. »: « Ils ont jeté Son héritage. »

\"That was a bit too close.\": Words spoken through tremendous temper, teeth clamped down, voice low.
« C'était un peu trop juste. »: Des mots prononcés à travers un énorme tempérament, dents serrées, voix basse.

\"That was a bit too close.\": \"The insidious force of Reeds. They cannot be stopped. They cannot be...\"
« C'était un peu trop juste. »: « L'insidieuse force des Reeds. Ils ne peuvent être arrêtés. Ils ne peuvent être... »

\"That was a bit too close.\": \"I never saw him. You did. So tell me: did Urth ever tell you to always rely on him?\"
« C'était un peu trop juste. »: « Je ne l'ai jamais vu. Toi oui. Alors dis-moi : Urth t'a-t-il jamais dit de toujours compter sur lui ? »

\"That was a bit too close.\": The paladin lifts his chin and glares at you.
« C'était un peu trop juste. »: Le paladin lève le menton et te fixe.

\"That was a bit too close.\": (Yell.) \"Did he ever ask for your FAITH, your utmost FAITH, in HIS ability to set things right in the end?\"
« C'était un peu trop juste. »: (Hurler.) « T'a-t-il jamais demandé ta FOI, ta plus grande FOI, en SA capacité à arranger les choses à la fin ? »

\"That was a bit too close.\": He opens his mouth to speak, yet nothing comes out.
« C'était un peu trop juste. »: Il ouvre la bouche pour parler, mais rien ne sort.

\"That was a bit too close.\": Push him.
